sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46275" key="zizoula/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζιζουλά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n46275.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">jujube</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:6:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.5</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. sq. and Ital. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giuggiola, zizzola.</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
